message:
fix(db): ensure base mode cleanup after migration connection

Add explicit base mode cleanup step after closing the migration
connection to handle edge cases where no migrations are applied
but implicit transaction state may linger:

- Open a dedicated cleanup connection after migration
- Call enforce_base_mode_cleanup to ensure database is in a clean
  state before pool connections acquire it
- Properly sequence connection lifecycle: migration -> cleanup -> pool

This prevents subtle issues where the first pool connection could
inherit unexpected state from the migration path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
